summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Mira OS P0 (MOJO 100%) and P1 (TODAY Tab) features. All key features verified working correctly.

P0_MOJO_header_pet_name.details: MOJO Modal header now shows dynamic pet name (e.g., 'Lola', 'Mystique') instead of static 'MOJO'. Verified with pet switching - header updates correctly when switching between pets.

P1_TODAY_Panel.details: TODAY Panel opens when clicking TODAY tab in navigation. Shows weather alerts (Mumbai temperature with SAFE/CAUTION badges), Other Pets section with status (Mystique, Bruno, Luna - all showing 'No urgent items'). Panel has close button functionality.

P1_Weight_History_in_Health_Vault.details: Weight History feature is implemented in MojoSectionEditors.jsx (lines 486-537). Includes expandable section, add/remove weight entries with date picker, history list showing up to 10 entries with auto-save.

P1_Next_Vaccination_Date.details: Next Vaccination Date field is implemented in MojoSectionEditors.jsx (lines 559-564). Uses TextField component with type='date' and auto-save functionality.

Pet_Switching.details: Pet switching works correctly. When switching from Lola to Mystique, the entire interface updates including reminders, MOJO modal header, and personalized content.

Auto_Save.details: Auto-save functionality implemented via useAutoSave hook. Changes saved after 1.5s of inactivity with status indicators (idle, saving, saved, error).

issues: Modal appears on every visit to /mira-demo page, may want to add 'Don't show again' option

critical_code_review_comments: MojoProfileModal.jsx line 1725: Header shows petData?.name with fallback to 'MOJO' - correctly implemented
MojoSectionEditors.jsx: Weight History and Next Vaccination Date properly integrated with auto-save
TodayPanel.jsx: Complete implementation with weather alerts, birthday countdown, urgent items, due soon cards, and other pets status
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing pet data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 and P1 features verified working. MOJO modal correctly shows dynamic pet names. TODAY panel shows weather, reminders, and other pets status. Weight History and Next Vaccination Date fields are in Health Vault editor. Pet switching updates all content correctly. The Today panel overlay may block clicks on elements behind it - use force=True in Playwright when needed.
verified_screenshots: TODAY Panel showing weather (Mumbai) with SAFE badge and OTHER PETS section
MOJO Modal with header showing 'Lola' and all sections (Soul Profile, Health Vault, Diet & Food, etc.)
MOJO Modal after pet switch showing 'Mystique' header with different soul profile data
Pet switcher dropdown with all pets listed
